zh.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq.於1505年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆達勒姆。他和Mary Layton至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1558年10月7日在英國英格蘭達勒姆享年53歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆瑟其費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq.于1505年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆達勒姆。他和Mary Layton至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1558年10月7日在英国英格兰達勒姆享年53岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆瑟其費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: Cuthbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name composed of cūð ‘known’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. This was borne by two pre-Conquest English saints: a 7th-century bishop of Lindisfarne and an 8th-century archbishop of Canterbury who corresponded with St Boniface . The name has been in more or less continuous use in the northern counties of England from the 13th century, though its use has declined over recent decades.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq. was born in 1505, in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Mary Layton. He died on 7 October 1558, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Sedgefield, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq. est né en 1505, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Mary Layton. Il est décédé le 7 octobre 1558, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Sedgefield, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq. wurde 1505 in Durham, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Mary Layton mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Oktober 1558 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sedgefield, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq. è nato il nel 1505 nel Durham, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Mary Layton. Morì il 7 ottobre 1558, nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Sedgefield, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq.は1505年にイギリスイギリスダルハムダルハムで生まれた。彼はMary Laytonとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1558年10月7日にイギリスイギリスダルハムで53歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムセジェフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq.(은)는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 뒤람에서 태어났다. 그는 Mary Layton(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 10월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 세지필드에 묻혔다.

mn.Horden, County Durham, County Durham, En: Durham, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq. nasceu em 1505, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Mary Layton. Ele faleceu em 7 de outubro de 1558, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Sedgefield, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq. родился в 1505 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mary Layton. Он умер 7 октября 1558 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности седжефиелд, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuthbert Conyers Esq. nació en 1505, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Mary Layton. Murió el 7 de octubre de 1558, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Sedgefield, Durham, Inglaterra.
